# How HR.com hit $42.6M revenue and 1.9M customers in 2024.

Provider of an online social community intended to be used to reach qualified candidates. The company's online social community offers its members with access to shared knowledge on practices, trends and industry news to develop their people and also provides access to various articles, case studies, newsletters, surveys and discussion forums, enabling Human Resource (HR) professionals to reach the right candidate for their client companies.

## 1999

Founded

## HR.com Revenue

In 2024, HR.com’s revenue reached $42.6M up from $28.5M in 2023. The company previously reported $28.5M in 2023, $21.8M in 2021. Since its launch in 1999, HR.com has shown consistent revenue growth, reflecting its expanding user base and increasing adoption across various industries.

### 2024

HR.com hit $42.6M in revenue in October 2024.

### 2023

HR.com hit $28.5M in revenue in October 2023.

### 2021

HR.com hit $21.8M in revenue in April 2021.

### 1999

HR.com launched in 1999 with $0 revenue

## What IsHR.com?
HR.com, the largest global social networking and resource site for HR Professionals. At HR.com, we are committed to creating inspired and informed workforces by maximizing the potential of HR professionals around the world. Over 1.7 million HR professionals rely on HR.com as the foremost, trusted industry resource for education, career development, and compliance. Offerings include 85+ primary research reports from the HR Research Institute, 250+ annual webcasts, the most comprehensive HR certification exam preparation program supporting SHRM and HRCI certification, webcast credits for SPHR/PHR/SHRM-CP/SHRM-SCP HR Certification, legal compliance guidance program, an on-demand training library housing thousands of lessons and tips, and 13 monthly themed

HR.com Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ
LeadIQ logo
Learn more at LeadIQ.com
Start free
## Insights
**HR Certification Programs**HR.com offers HR certification exam preparation programs supporting SHRM and HRCI certification, providing a potential avenue for selling certification training courses and materials.
**Networking Opportunities**HR.com serves as a platform for HR professionals worldwide to network with each other, presenting an opportunity to offer networking events, webinars, or collaborative tools for enhanced engagement.
**Recent Awards and Events**HR.com has recently attended and hosted industry events like the 2025 FutureHR Conference and the 2025 HR.com Awards, indicating a focus on industry recognition and engagement that could present partnership or sponsorship opportunities.
**Technology Integration**HR.com utilizes various technologies such as Google Analytics, Hotjar, and Amazon S3, indicating a readiness for digital solutions. This opens up opportunities for offering tech-related services or products to enhance their platform.
**Market Positioning**HR.com is recognized as the largest global social networking and resource site for HR professionals, showcasing a strong market presence that can be leveraged for collaborations, advertisements, or specialized HR services.

results.text:
HR.com - Products, Competitors, Financials, Employees, Headquarters Locations

## Founded Year

1999

## Stage

Series B | Alive

## Total Raised

$2.88M

## Last Raised

$1.5M | 25 yrs ago

## Mosaic Score The Mosaic Score is an algorithm that measures the overall financial health and market potential of private companies.

+16 points in the past 30 days

## About HR.com

HR.com is a resource and networking platform focused on human resources education and certification within the HR industry. The company provides HR certification preparation, legal compliance guidance, industry research, and educational webcasts and events. HR.com serves HR professionals seeking education and recertification credits. It was founded in 1999 and is based in Tampa, Florida.

## Headquarters Location

4890 West Kennedy Boulevard Suite 500

Tampa, Florida, 33609,

United States

877-222-2222

An all inclusive learning and certification program for all roles within HR

# HR Tech

6,137 items

The HR tech collection includes software vendors that enable companies to develop, hire, manage, and pay their workforces. Focus areas include benefits, compensation, engagement, EORs & PEOs, HRIS & HRMS, learning & development, payroll, talent acquisition, and talent management.

Learn more by requesting a demo

## Latest HR.com News

New Study Identifies Critical Gaps and Future-Proofing Strategies for Talent Acquisition in 2026

Feb 8, 2026

IRVINE, CA / ACCESS Newswire / February 4, 2026 / While 77% of human resource (HR) professionals identify talent acquisition (TA) as a top five organizational priority, more than half are struggling with outdated or insufficient processes, according to a comprehensive new analysis by The HR Research Institute (HRRI), the research arm of HR.com. The study, Hiring Trends and Strategies 2026: Future-Proof Your Talent Acquisition Process conducted in partnership with Accurate , the world's largest independent provider of compliant background screening and monitoring solutions, also found that 58% of organizations have “subpar” recruitment functions, categorized as nonexistent, chaotic, or basic/reactive. These shortcomings carry a heavy financial burden. A single bad hire can cost an organization roughly 30% of that employee's annual earnings. The impact of these “regrettable hires” is widespread: 43% of HR professionals report they would rehire fewer than half of the candidates they brought on last year. “We're seeing more organizations recognize talent acquisition as a strategic priority,” said Tim Dowd, CEO of Accurate. “But this research shows that real impact only happens when that priority is backed
